text: Alex Candidate alex@example.test +57 300 000 0000 linkedin.com/in/alexcandidate Experience as a PreSales Architect leading solution architecture for enterprise discovery, stakeholder management, proposal writing, and AI workflow design. Built cloud migration roadmaps with product, security, and delivery teams. Achievements include aligning technical scope to business outcomes, facilitating workshops, and documenting architecture decisions. Education includes systems engineering coursework and continuous learning in cloud platforms. Skills include solution architecture, cloud migration planning, stakeholder management, proposal writing, AI workflow design, facilitation, discovery, estimation, risk framing, and executive communication. Logros include reusable templates, clearer handoffs, improved proposal quality, better role-fit narratives, structured discovery notes, safer assumptions logs, practical executive summaries, discovery briefs, and interview-ready evidence while preserving evidence and avoiding unsupported metrics or invented credentials.
